summary: Bug fix verified: Preventivo PRV-2026-0004 data reset and invoice counter unified. All 8 tests passed confirming: 1) preventivo has total_invoiced=0, converted_to=None, empty linked_invoices, 2) status remains 'accettato', 3) all 18 existing invoices intact, 4) convert-to-invoice endpoint now uses same counter_id format '{uid}_FT_{year}' as progressive-invoice, 5) document numbers use format '{N}/{year}' (e.g., '20/2026'), 6) counter value at 19 consistent with highest invoice number.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 150 verified invoice counter bugfix for preventivo PRV-2026-0004 (Electric Style, 2440 EUR). Key verifications: 1) Preventivo data properly reset (total_invoiced=0, converted_to=None, linked_invoices=[]); 2) Both convert-to-invoice and progressive-invoice endpoints now use unified counter_id format '{uid}_FT_{year}'; 3) Document numbers in format '{N}/{year}' not old 'FT-{year}/{N}'; 4) Counter user_97c773827822_FT_2026 at value 19; 5) All 18 existing invoices intact. The preventivo is real user data - keep it clean.
verified_features: All 18 existing invoices intact (no data loss)
Both endpoints generate document_number in format '{N}/{year}'
